title: DeepClaude – Claude Code agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro
summary: DeepClaude is an open-source code agent framework that integrates Anthropic's Claude with DeepSeek V4 Pro in a recursive reasoning loop, enabling iterative code generation, self-reflection, and tool-augmented execution. It demonstrates a practical architecture for enhancing LLM-based coding agents through model collaboration and structured feedback loops. The project emphasizes real-world usability, with runnable examples and clear documentation on GitHub.
key_insight: 多模型协作的递归反馈环比单模型链式调用更能缓解幻觉并提升代码生成质量。
